src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/viewem/con.general_idea: Remove unused imports that are no longer referenced in the class body.
Remove commented-out annotation declarations that are no longer needed.
Remove large block of commented-out bean definitions for DataSource, EntityManagerFactory, and TransactionManager.
Refactor security configuration to use constants for path matching instead of hardcoded strings.
Remove explicit CSRF and frame options disabling in favor of default behavior or library-managed settings.
Add /favicon.ico to the list of ignored static resources in WebSecurity configuration.
Reorder security configuration classes to ensure correct precedence of security filters.
Add /api/** paths to the REST security configuration to permit all access to API endpoints.
Add new launch endpoint to handle OIDC token validation and roster synchronization on application launch.
src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/viewem/con.why_exists: The new LTI 1.3 flow requires explicit handling of the OIDC token and roster updates at launch time, which was not present in the previous controller structure.

src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/viewem/con.general_idea: Inject new services required for roster management and user synchronization in the new launch flow.
src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/viewem/con.why_exists: The new launch logic depends on CourseService and SystemUserService which were not previously injected or used in this controller.

src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/viewem/con.general_idea: Refactor error message handling to use previewWarnings instead of errors for skipped users.
src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/viewem/con.why_exists: This is a UI/UX improvement to distinguish between fatal errors and warnings, not a compilation requirement.

src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/viewem/con.general_idea: Update string utility method call from arrayToCommaDelimitedString to arrayToDelimitedString.
src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/viewem/con.why_exists: arrayToCommaDelimitedString is deprecated in newer versions of Apache Commons Lang; arrayToDelimitedString is the recommended replacement.

src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/viewem/con.general_idea: Comment out the entire ViewemLtiController class to disable the LTI launch functionality.

Add OpenAPI 3 Operation annotation to undeleteSheet endpoint.

src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/viewem/mod.why_exists: The class likely no longer relies on Spring Data REST export mechanisms, or the custom annotation provides necessary metadata for the application's specific REST resource handling logic.

src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/viewem/mod.general_idea: Replace the Spring Data REST annotation with a custom project-specific annotation to decouple from Spring Data REST or change resource exposure logic.
src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/viewem/mod.why_exists: The class likely no longer relies on Spring Data REST for exposing this entity, or the custom annotation provides specific behavior required by the new architecture; keeping the old import would be unused or incorrect if the annotation is removed.
